error_signature: unable to access google sheet file
title: Unable to access Google Sheet file after credential setup
symptom: After creating Google Sheet credentials, the user cannot access their Google Sheet file, despite following the credential setup process.
not_this_if: Credentials are not set up correctly
root_cause: The error occurs because the necessary OAuth scopes for accessing Google Sheets and related APIs have not been added during the credential setup process. Without these scopes, n8n cannot access the user's Google Sheets.
fix_steps: Enable the required API in Google Cloud Platform (e.g., Google Drive API).
Check the necessary OAuth scopes for Google Sheets access.
Add the required scopes in the 'Sign in with Google' window.
Complete the 'Sign in with Google' process.
agent_instruction: Ensure all required OAuth scopes are added during the Google credential setup.
safety_notes: Delete any shared videos that may expose sensitive keys.
